title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CCAvenue - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CCAvenue - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at CCAvenue are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CCAvenue:
CCAvenue is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
